segments.text: The elders who are among you I exhort, I who am a fellow elder and a witness of the sufferings of Christ, and also a partaker of the glory that will be revealed:
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: Shepherd the flock of God which is among you, serving as overseers, not by compulsion but willingly, not for dishonest gain but eagerly;
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: nor as being lords over those entrusted to you, but being examples to the flock;
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: and when the Chief Shepherd appears, you will receive the crown of glory that does not fade away.
segments.speaker: Peter

verses.title: Submit to God, Resist the Devil

segments.text: Likewise you younger people, submit yourselves to your elders. Yes, all of you be submissive to one another, and be clothed with humility, for "God resists the proud, But gives grace to the humble."
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: Therefore humble yourselves under the mighty hand of God, that He may exalt you in due time,
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: casting all your care upon Him, for He cares for you.
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: Be sober, be vigilant; because your adversary the devil walks about like a roaring lion, seeking whom he may devour.
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: Resist him, steadfast in the faith, knowing that the same sufferings are experienced by your brotherhood in the world.
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: But may the God of all grace, who called us to His eternal glory by Christ Jesus, after you have suffered a while, perfect, establish, strengthen, and settle you.
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: To Him be the glory and the dominion forever and ever. Amen.
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: By Silvanus, our faithful brother as I consider him,
I have written to you briefly, exhorting and testifying that this is the true grace of God in which you stand.
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: She who is in Babylon, elect together with you, greets you; and so does Mark my son.
Greet one another with a kiss of love. Peace to you all who are in Christ Jesus. Amen.
segments.speaker: Peter
